overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a vast frozen mountain lake surrounded by snow-capped peaks. The character transitions from walking on cracked ice to rocky snow-covered shoreline terrain, where a mysterious vertical beam of light appears in the distance, illuminating the valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen mountain lake surface surrounded by peaks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the cracked ice surface of a frozen lake, heading toward the distant mountain pass

entered.detail: vast expanse of cracked ice with visible fracture lines reflecting the overcast sky
towering snow-covered peaks surrounding the valley on all sides
steep granite cliff face with patches of snow and ice
steep mountain wall with snow-covered ledges

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a vast frozen lake surrounded by towering snow-capped mountains under an overcast sky. The ice surface shows visible cracks and reflects the gray clouds above as the character moves steadily forward through the open valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline at frozen lake edge

events.description: character steps off the ice onto rocky snow-covered ground along the lake shoreline

agents.ego_description: traversing the rocky shoreline at the edge of the frozen lake, moving along the base of the mountain wall

entered.detail: uneven terrain of snow-dusted rocks and boulders at the water's edge
close-up view of the steep cliff wall with exposed rock and ice formations

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open ice to the rocky shoreline, walking along the base of a steep mountain cliff. The frozen lake falls behind to the right as the terrain becomes more rugged and enclosed by the surrounding peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain path with ancient light beam structure

events.description: a brilliant vertical beam of light suddenly appears in the distance, illuminating the mountain valley

agents.ego_description: pausing to observe the mysterious light beam before continuing along the narrow rocky mountain path

entered.detail: intense column of white light extending vertically from the ground into the clouds
ruined technological architecture at the base of the light beam
large rocks blanketed in snow lining the path

segments.scene_description: A mysterious vertical beam of light appears in the distance as the character follows the narrow rocky path deeper into the mountains. The character pauses to observe the phenomenon before continuing along the snow-covered terrain toward the ancient structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey across a desolate frozen expanse that gradually narrows into a rugged mountain pass illuminated by a mysterious light. It begins with the character traversing a vast frozen lake under an overcast sky, where the cracked ice reflects the gray clouds of the open valley. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the open ice to a rocky shoreline, with the frozen lake receding to the right as the terrain becomes more enclosed by steep mountain cliffs. The path then narrows into a rugged, snow-covered trail that leads deeper into the peaks, where a vertical beam of light suddenly appears in the distance. The character pauses to observe this phenomenon before finally continuing along the rocky terrain toward the ancient structure.
